title: Johannesburg, Gauteng — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Johannesburg, Gauteng: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Johannesburg is a city in Gauteng with a population of 5,635,000. South Africa’s largest city and economic powerhouse, known for its gold mining history, diverse culture, and vibrant arts scene.

Last updated: July 14, 2026
